examples.description: Updated description for the coach dashboard.

input_examples.description: Updated description for the coach dashboard.

athlete_id.description: Target athlete; defaults to selected athlete in coach mode, or the only athlete otherwise. Format: i12345 or 12345.

content.description: Optional sparse content patch. Validated against the existing item_type schema, then merged so omitted keys stay untouched; see icuvisor://custom-item-schemas.

description.description: Optional replacement custom item description. Omit to leave unchanged; empty strings are preserved when intentionally supplied.

hide_script.description: Optional replacement upstream hide_script flag. Omit to leave unchanged.

image.description: Optional replacement upstream image identifier or URL when supported by the custom-item type. Omit to leave unchanged.

index.description: Optional replacement display/order index. Omit to leave unchanged.

item_id.description: Required intervals.icu custom item ID to update. Surrounding whitespace is trimmed.

name.description: Optional replacement custom item name. Omit to leave unchanged.

visibility.description: Optional replacement upstream visibility value. Omit to leave unchanged.
